title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates:
Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates!
